note: E19 is the halt point for tranche E13-E22 aggregation. E20 (HAL review / MAYOR ship gate) is the sovereign step that reviews this closure report and decides whether to open E21-E23. Until E20 executes, the tranche is in SHIPPED-but-unratified state. This report is the input to that review.
